---
name: Drive-by finding
about: Out-of-scope improvement noticed during other work
title: "Drive-by: "
labels: ["follow-up"]
---

<!--
Filed by an implementer agent (per docs/orchestration-plan.md §5 item 6) or a
human who spotted an unrelated improvement while doing other work. PR diffs
stay scoped; the work for this finding happens in a separate, intentional PR.
-->

**Discovered while:** working on #\<n\> / PR #\<n\>

**Where:** `path/to/file.ts:42` (or section in a doc, or feature area)

**What's wrong / could be better:**

\<Concrete problem statement. Include enough context that a future implementer can act cold. Avoid vague observations like "this could be cleaner".\>

**Why it's out of scope for the originating work:**

\<One sentence so future-you remembers why this wasn't fixed in place.\>

**Suggested fix (optional):**

\<Pointer to a fix approach if obvious; leave blank if open-ended.\>
